subcategory: Rotating text animation with dynamic width selector
use_cases: Animated hero section headlines that cycle through taglines
Dynamic feature highlights with smooth vertical word transitions
Marketing copy with auto-sizing text selector for visual emphasis
Product tagline displays with premium GSAP-powered motion
Landing page word animations for engaging user attention
ai_summary: A GSAP-powered looping words animation component that vertically cycles through text strings with smooth expo.out easing. Features a dynamic selector edge element that auto-calculates and animates its width to match the centered word, creating a polished text presentation effect. Designed for hero sections and marketing pages requiring animated headlines with professional-grade motion design.
